docs_sources: source_facts.repo is the official GitHub project; README is the best official documentation surface in the supplied facts.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has official repository https://github.com/nametake/golangci-lint-langserver; per instruction repo is returned as null and not re-evaluated.
